Describe the sequence of visual elements presented from the beginning of the video until the interior scene appears.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a green geometric logo fades in against a black background; at 6s, white text reading 'BRICK CURTAIN HOUSE' appears centered; at 10s, the scene changes to a modern house exterior with beige slats and red brick; at 14s, a person with long black hair faces a wooden table covered in red cloth.

question: Walk through the specific architectural and human elements visible during the house showcase segments.
canonical_answer: At 10s, a two-story building with vertical beige slats is visible on the left; at 11s, a swing chair hangs under the covered area of the right building; at 14s, a person wearing a black top kneels before a wooden altar; at 15s, red chairs are visible through large glass walls inside the house.
